info.title: asicts
info.description: Command-line tool for creating and verifying ASiC-S timestamp containers. Prove that files existed at a specific point in time using trusted Timestamp Authorities.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: ASiC Timestamp Container Tool — create and verify RFC 3161 timestamped containers (ASiC-S and ASiC-E)

commands.name: stamp
commands.description: Create an ASiC container with a timestamp for one or more files

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: The file(s) to timestamp (multiple files create an ASiC-E container)

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify an ASiC container (ASiC-S or ASiC-E)

commands.name: renew
commands.description: Renew the timestamp on an ASiC container for long-term archival

commands.name: extract
commands.description: Extract files from an ASiC container (ASiC-S or ASiC-E)
